mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( login_id, password, nickname, birth_date, region ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{birthDate}, #{region} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, nickname, birth_date AS birthDate, region, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, nickname, birth_date AS birthDate, region, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
